variants.name: 学生
variants.ability: 每个白天，你可以私下询问说书人一个问题。如果说书人回答了你，你可能会在当晚死亡。
variants.otherNightReminder: 如果你回答了学生的问题，标记学生“好奇害死猫”。如果学生拥有此标记，他可以死亡。
variants.flavor: 老师，打扰一下，关于您上次的心理学课程我有个问题！您说到大多数自恋者会让别人不舒服并以此为乐，而莎莉美丽的双眼让我不舒服，这是否意味着她是自恋者？

variants.name: 学生
variants.ability: 每局游戏限两次，在夜晚时，你可以选择一个角色：你会得知这个角色是否在场。
variants.firstNightReminder: If the Student isn't marked with the NO ABILITY reminder token, wake the Student. They might choose a character. Nod your head "Yes" if they're in-play. Otherwise, shake your head "No". Then, if the Student used their ability, mark the Student with their NO ABILITY reminder token. Then, put the Student to sleep.
variants.otherNightReminder: If the Student isn't marked with the NO ABILITY reminder token, wake the Student. They might choose a character. Nod your head "Yes" if they're in-play. Otherwise, shake your head "No". Then, if the Student used their ability, mark the Student with their NO ABILITY reminder token. Then, put the Student to sleep.
variants.flavor: We don't have a Squire in this town!
